mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM eb_customer t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY name DESC LIMIT 24
SELECT IFNULL(t.contract_category, '') AS name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM eb_contract t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY t.contract_category ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT CAST(t.uid AS CHAR) AS name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM eb_customer t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.uid IS NOT NULL AND t.uid > 0 GROUP BY t.uid ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') AS name, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(t.num), 0) AS SIGNED) AS cnt FROM eb_client_bill t WHERE t.bill_types = 1 AND t.date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY name DESC LIMIT 24
